items.name_cn:
Denim Blue in Stock!!️
Callisto hobo bag series. This summer must be a healing blue. The cute crescent bag shape, Denim Blue Oblique fabric, and matching calfskin leather are full of details. Zipper closure design, small and lightweight yet incredibly spacious. Paired with a circular charm featuring a star symbol and chain pearl decoration, it is full of exquisite details.
Size: 29*4*14cm

items.name_en: DI0R❣️Oblique Backpack 'Big D Black Canvas Large'
items.name_cn:
DI0R❣️Oblique Backpack 'Big D Black Canvas Large'
A DI0R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's item. Featuring a vintage print on canvas with a small metal logo, it is soft and cute. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is small in weight with great style ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has been integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude ~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week everywhere. Recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 30×42×15CM
Small: 23.5×11×32CM
#088#510

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 12 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Small Black Dior Toujours Shopping Bag. Fashion-forward individuals have already been spotted carrying this; it is cooler than imagined, giving off a chic yet lazy vibe. The familiar oversized woven pattern and the CD buckle used in recent years transform the square bag into a tote bag when unclasped—truly amazing 👍👍👍.
It looks very spacious at first glance, suitable for gym or daily commuting. It comes with an internal small leather pouch that can be removed and used separately! The key detail is the adjustable wrist strap length, allowing for underarm or hand-carry; this detail is truly captivating. A bag that will make you stand out in any crowd, unrestricted by style. A heavyweight bestseller this season—why wait?

specs.rawTitle:
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 12 cm

The key detail is the adjustable wrist strap length, allowing for underarm or hand-carry; this detail is truly captivating. A bag that will make you stand out in any crowd, unrestricted by style. A heavyweight bestseller this season—why wait?

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Full Leather Bucket Bag. The design is really special, a mix of cool and sweet! At first glance, you will be captivated by its print: the overlapping CD letter print is very eye-catching. Made of calfskin, it has a soft, delicate touch and a moist luster, maintaining an elegant and atmospheric texture!
The "dior" lettering on the pocket is finely engraved, looking very high-end and classy. Looking at the size, it is large enough with internal layering to ensure storage of personal items without looking too bulky. The detail design is simple and orderly, perfect for friends with OCD!

specs.rawTitle:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Full Leather Bucket Bag. The design is really special, a mix of cool and sweet! At first glance, you will be captivated by its print: the overlapping CD letter print is very eye-catching. The "dior" lettering on the pocket is finely engraved, looking very high-end and classy. Looking at the size, it is large enough with internal layering to ensure storage of personal items without looking too bulky. The detail design is simple and orderly, perfect for friends with OCD!

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Monogram Bucket Bag. Elegant and classic, with blue oblique monogram fabric, the unique bucket shape looks like a money bag!
Features a rotating D-letter opening CD lock; tightening the opening ensures high security, while loosening it gives a casual, lazy feel. Both the short and long shoulder straps are adjustable and detachable. The rigid base gives it a more three-dimensional look, maximizing the atmosphere!
Mainly achieving bag freedom, sisters, go for it!

specs.rawTitle:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Monogram Bucket Bag. Elegant and classic, with blue oblique monogram fabric, the unique bucket shape looks like a money bag!
Features a rotating D-letter opening CD lock; tightening the opening ensures high security, while loosening it gives a casual, lazy feel. Both the short and long shoulder straps are adjustable and detachable. The rigid base gives it a more three-dimensional look, maximizing the atmosphere!
Mainly achieving bag freedom, sisters, go for it!

items.name_cn:
Dio Lady Matte Blue 17cm
Model: 6603
Classic and timeless, the matte finish is a must-have for early spring and early summer.
Pair it with fresh blue jeans this summer and you'll be the trendiest on the street!
Pure blue exudes a French lazy fairy vibe, clean and pure yet creative.
Can be sweet, cool, or ethereal.
Compared to Dior's previous glossy and lambskin versions, the matte calfskin is more durable and less prone to scratches.
Notably, the chain is the same color as the bag body, making it very eye-catching.
Three-compartment mini size with enough daily capacity, it won't dig into your hand.
A highly cost-effective entry-level luxury bag.
Dimensions: 17*7.5*14
